case_title: GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. VS GILLES, PATRICK E. DBA RED DEVIL LOUNGE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. AS TO DEFENDANT GILLES, PATRICK E. DBA RED DEVIL LOUNGE RED DEVIL LOUNGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. NOTICE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING SET FOR 4/17/07 @ 1:30PM BEFORE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH. EXHIBITS TO REMAIN IN FILE UNTIL JUDGMENT RENDERED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-19-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-31-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR HEARING ON 7/31/06 AT 6:30 P.M.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM. DEFENDANT'S CLAIMS OFF CALENDAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY GILLES, PATRICK E. DBA RED DEVIL LOUNGE RED DEVIL LOUNGE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT AND SETTING CASE FOR FURTHER TRIAL-POS-MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-25-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-17-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER MARCH 14, 2007, ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT. THIS CASE WILL BE SET FOR TRIAL ON APRIL 17, 2007 AT 1:30PM.
JUDGMENT ENTERED AS BELOW: DEFENDANT PATRICK E. GILLES, DBA RED DEVIL LOUNGE, DOES NOT OWE PLAINTIFF JAVIER R. GONZALEZ, ANY
JUDGMENT IS INVALID PER 3/14/2007 COURT ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GILLES, PATRICK E. DBA RED DEVIL LOUNGE RED DEVIL LOUNGE AT THE HEARING OF THIS MATTER ON APRIL 17, 2007, IT WAS DETERMINED THAT THE CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED IN THIS ACTION HAD NOT BEEN SERVED AND THE CROSS- COMPLAINANT ADVISED OF HIS INTENTION TO ABANDON THE CROSS-ACTION AGAINST THE CROSS-DEFENDANT. CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GILLES, PATRICK E. DBA RED DEVIL LOUNGE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-31-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-25-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE FOR COMPLETION BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT.
PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. AND NOTICE OF MOT. FOR RECON MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
ADDRESS CHANGE FOR DEFENDANT PATRICK GILLES FILED AND ENTERED.
